--- gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

G

-----Original Message-----
From: "Sacks, Ian" Ian.Sacks@towerbrook.com
Date: Tue, 18 Jul 2006 06:17:47
To:gmax1@mindspring.com
Subject: Hey

Been trying to get in touch....in absence of being
able to speak or meet....let me say.....I keep
getting pushes from the clinic and the dr I introd u
too to move forward and for me to be
involved.....which I am encouraged about....I feel
all the pieces r there.....yet I am feeling as if
there is little interest on yours of je's part to
continue pushing this project....we r all
busy....its summer.....all the typical stuff.....but
I want to ensure to give u and je proper
respect.....relationships r more important than
business opptys.....

We don't even need to have je meet the dr.....I can
structure and get this whole thing going....we need
to remove bottlenecks here.....I need to
meet/discuss with u and je roles and structure to
show proper respect and we can proceed...this can
happen in 10 minutes probably......pls let me know
when we can meet....I can get doc to come or not...

Pls advise....

Only the best.....

Ian
